{{Quote|I have heard of the human worlds, and have been anxious to establish trading partnerships with your people. The Zabin hive has long provided the finest-tasting ghost spydrs in the galaxy. Yet I have no direct outlet to the human worlds.|Zabin|<ref name="Missions 6" />}}
'''Zabin''' was a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] [[Queen/Legends|queen]]. She presided over the [[Zabin Hive]] on [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. Her offspring included [[Garindan/Legends|Garindan]] and [[Udin]].
